title: LetMeSpeak
description: Prevents you losing your chat message from game events closing it.
body:
Prevents you losing your chat message from game events closing it.

This mod was made specifically because of murder mystery, which closes your chat when you die, and then it closes your chat again when you are put into spectator. This simply saves the chat state, so if the chat closes when you don't close it manually, your chat message will save.

This also works cross worlds, so if you are sent to a different lobby while typing, it will also save there.
